name: ralph-wiggum-codex-plugin
description: Codex-native Ralph Wiggum loop plugin for bounded detached codex exec runs.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded detached Codex Ralph loops
interface.longDescription: Start, inspect, steer, and stop bounded detached codex exec loops from a local Codex plugin with repo-local .ralph state.
defaultPrompt: Use the Ralph loop commands when you want a bounded detached codex exec loop with status, stop, and add-context controls.
